summary: A clip of an MSNBC television interview of Secretary Mayorkas appearing remotely, with the network's lower-third chyron reading 'BREAKING NEWS / BIDEN CRACKS DOWN ON ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION WHILE GIVING THOSE WHO SPENT YEARS HERE A PATHWAY TO CITIZENSHIP' and the MSNBC and Alex Wagner Tonight logos. It is a recorded cable-news segment of a policy interview with no music.
